name: logistics carriers managing 5–15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 5–15 vehicles, inefficient monitoring of driver behavior causes increased fuel costs. We provide real-time insights instead of manual tracking and reporting.
problem_solved: Inefficient monitoring of driver behavior and fuel consumption
